description: Current-state legacy temporal field definitions allowed by the RFC-0083 Slice 1 temporal vocabulary guard.

allowlist.reason: Existing business date, snapshot, and timeseries table columns. New public contracts must use domain-specific temporal names.
Existing reference and series source-observed timestamp columns. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Legacy reference-data ingestion DTO fields have been moved into focused DTO-family modules. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Legacy benchmark, index, benchmark-return, and risk-free ingestion DTO fields have been moved into focused DTO-family modules. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.

Existing benchmark definition, composition, and benchmark-return ingestion DTO fields moved from reference_data_benchmark_dto.py during benchmark-record DTO modularization. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.

Existing index definition, index price, index return, and risk-free ingestion DTO fields moved from reference_data_benchmark_dto.py during index-series DTO modularization. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Existing classification taxonomy ingestion DTO field moved from reference_data_dto.py during support-reference DTO modularization. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
Existing reference integration DTO fields. New source-observation fields must use observed_at.
